statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); tokens=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); perm=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.permissions.mode // empty'); tokens_display=$(echo $tokens | awk '{printf "%.0fk", $1/1000}'); parts="$model ($tokens_display)"; if [ -n "$used" ]; then parts="$parts | Context: ${used}% used"; fi; if [ "$perm" = 'dangerously-skip-permissions' ]; then parts="$parts | DANGEROUS MODE"; fi; if [ -n "$CODER_WORKSPACE_NAME" ]; then parts="$parts | Coder: $CODER_WORKSPACE_NAME"; fi; echo "$parts"
